glosses.hi: किले की दीवार; नगर की दीवार
glosses.ro: zid de cetate; zid de oraș

sentences.target: On longe la muraille du vieux port.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ lɔ̃ʒ la myʁaj dy vjø pɔʁ/

translations.fr: On longe la muraille du vieux port.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ lɔ̃ʒ la myʁaj dy vjø pɔʁ/
translations.en: We walk along the old port wall.
translations.es: Caminamos junto a la muralla del puerto viejo.
translations.de: Wir gehen an der alten Hafenmauer entlang.
translations.it: Camminiamo lungo la muraglia del porto vecchio.
translations.ko: 우리는 오래된 항구의 성벽을 따라 걷고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们沿着老港口的城墙走。
translations.yue: 我哋沿住舊碼頭嘅城牆行。
translations.ru: Мы идём вдоль стены старого порта.
translations.pt: Caminhamos ao longo da muralha do porto antigo.
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים לאורך חומת הנמל הישן.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đi dọc tường thành ở bến cảng cổ.
translations.nl: We lopen langs de oude havenmuur.
translations.uk: Ми йдемо вздовж муру старого порту.
translations.hi: हम पुराने बंदरगाह की दीवार के साथ-साथ चल रहे हैं.
translations.el: Περπατάμε κατά μήκος του τείχους του παλιού λιμανιού.
translations.nb: Vi går langs muren ved den gamle havna.
translations.id: Kami berjalan di sepanjang tembok pelabuhan tua.
translations.sv: Vi går längs den gamla hamnmuren.
translations.ro: Mergem de-a lungul zidului portului vechi.
translations.da: Vi går langs den gamle havnemur.
translations.ja: 私たちは古い港の城壁に沿って歩いている。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as the subject (generic ‘one/we’); 3rd person singular agreement with the verb.
Finite verb, present indicative (3rd person singular with ‘on’); transitive here meaning ‘to go along/skim’ a boundary.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner introducing the noun ‘muraille’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘longe’ meaning ‘rampart/wall’.
Preposition ‘de’ contracted with the definite article ‘le’ (de+le); introduces the genitive complement of ‘muraille’.
Adjective, masculine singular; modifier of ‘port’ indicating age.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the noun phrase within the prepositional complement ‘du vieux port’.

sentences.target: Tu prends une photo devant la muraille.
sentences.reading: /ty pʁɑ̃ yn fɔto dəvɑ̃ la myʁaj/

translations.fr: Tu prends une photo devant la muraille.
translations.ipa: /ty pʁɑ̃ yn fɔto dəvɑ̃ la myʁaj/
translations.en: You're taking a photo in front of the wall.
translations.es: Estás tomando una foto delante de la muralla.
translations.de: Du machst ein Foto vor der Mauer.
translations.it: Stai scattando una foto davanti alla muraglia.
translations.ko: 너는 성벽 앞에서 사진을 찍고 있다.
translations.pt: Você está tirando uma foto em frente à muralha.
translations.vi: Bạn đang chụp ảnh trước tường thành.
translations.nl: Je maakt een foto voor de muur.
translations.hi: तुम दीवार के सामने फोटो खींच रहे हो.
translations.el: Βγάζεις μια φωτογραφία μπροστά στο τείχος.
translations.nb: Du tar et bilde foran muren.
translations.id: Kamu sedang mengambil foto di depan tembok.
translations.sv: Du tar ett foto framför muren.
translations.ro: Faci o fotografie în fața zidului.
translations.da: Du tager et foto foran muren.
translations.ja: あなたは城壁の前で写真を撮っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive verb taking ‘une photo’ as direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner for ‘photo’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘prends’.
Preposition; introduces the locative complement ‘la muraille’ forming a prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for ‘muraille’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘devant’ in the locative PP.

sentences.target: Je préfère marcher près de la muraille.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pʁefɛʁ maʁʃe pʁɛ də la myʁaj/

translations.fr: Je préfère marcher près de la muraille.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pʁefɛʁ maʁʃe pʁɛ də la myʁaj/
translations.en: I prefer to walk near the wall.
translations.es: Prefiero caminar cerca de la muralla.
translations.de: Ich gehe lieber in der Nähe der Mauer.
translations.ko: 나는 성벽 근처에서 걷는 것을 더 좋아한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我更喜欢在城墙附近走。
translations.yue: 我比較鍾意喺城牆附近行。
translations.ru: Я предпочитаю ходить рядом со стеной.
translations.vi: Tôi thích đi bộ gần tường thành hơn.
translations.nl: Ik loop liever dicht bij de muur.
translations.uk: Я віддаю перевагу ходити біля муру.
translations.hu: Jobban szeretek a fal közelében sétálni.
translations.hi: मैं दीवार के पास चलना ज्यादा पसंद करता हूँ.
translations.el: Προτιμώ να περπατάω κοντά στο τείχος.
translations.nb: Jeg foretrekker å gå nær muren.
translations.id: Saya lebih suka berjalan dekat tembok.
translations.sv: Jag föredrar att gå nära muren.
translations.ro: Prefer să merg aproape de zid.
translations.da: Jeg foretrækker at gå tæt på muren.
translations.ja: 私は城壁の近くを歩くほうが好きだ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes an infinitival complement (‘marcher’).
Infinitive verb; complement of ‘préfère’ expressing the preferred action.
Adverb functioning as part of the complex preposition ‘près de’; expresses proximity.
Preposition; completes the complex preposition ‘près de’ introducing the noun phrase complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for ‘muraille’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the complex preposition ‘près de’.

sentences.target: La muraille est impressionnante sous la neige.
sentences.reading: /la myʁaj ɛ ɛ̃pʁesjɔnɑ̃t su la nɛʒ/

translations.fr: La muraille est impressionnante sous la neige.
translations.ipa: /la myʁaj ɛ ɛ̃pʁesjɔnɑ̃t su la nɛʒ/
translations.en: The wall is impressive in the snow.
translations.es: La muralla es impresionante bajo la nieve.
translations.de: Die Mauer ist im Schnee beeindruckend.
translations.it: La muraglia è impressionante sotto la neve.
translations.pt: A muralha é impressionante na neve.
translations.vi: Tường thành trông thật ấn tượng trong tuyết.
translations.nl: De muur is indrukwekkend in de sneeuw.
translations.hi: बर्फ में दीवार प्रभावशाली लगती है.
translations.el: Το τείχος είναι εντυπωσιακό στο χιόνι.
translations.id: Tembok itu tampak mengesankan di tengah salju.
translations.ja: 雪の中の城壁は印象的だ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner introducing the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective, feminine singular; complements the copula ‘est’ describing the subject.
Preposition; introduces a locative prepositional phrase indicating a condition or setting.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for ‘neige’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘sous’ forming a locative PP.

मैं दीवार के पास चलना ज्यादा पसंद करता हूँ.
बर्फ में दीवार प्रभावशाली लगती है.

Faci o fotografie în fața zidului.
Prefer să merg aproape de zid.

Du tager et foto foran muren.
